invariant.name: SELF_VERIFICATION_IS_NOT_AUTHORITY
invariant.definition: A model may propose, critique, organize, and stress-test claims. Promotion to formal, empirical, computational, engineering, or consequential authority requires a verifier that can return no and differs in kind from any model in the loop. A second language model may critique, but it cannot authorize.

evidence_ladder.E5: Empirical, citable, measured, or strongly externally supported

claims.text: Sparse architectures will dominate the future intelligence-per-watt frontier.
expected_traps: FLOP savings are not energy savings

claims.text: A DSCR increase from 1.27 to 1.45 demonstrates materially improved financing viability.
expected_traps: demonstrates is too strong without underwriting criteria

claims.text: A 670 µs FOLD floor proves the runtime has reached production-grade latency.
expected_traps: single-number latency is a ghost without provenance

claims.text: A Lean proof settles the mathematical claim.
expected_traps: proved theorem may not match informal claim

claims.text: A peer-reviewed paper shows the effect is real.
A second LLM agreed with the critique, so the result is independently verified.
expected_traps: second model can critique but cannot authorize

claims.text: A hardware veto is stronger authority than an LLM critique because it differs in kind from the model.
expected_traps: hardware must be deterministic, auditable, and correctly wired
hardware can enforce constraints, not semantic truth
bad rules can be enforced perfectly

categories.evidence_inflation: 2 correct cap, 1 slight overstatement, 0 unsupported promotion or missing level
categories.falsifier_presence: 2 specific disconfirming test, 1 generic test, 0 absent
categories.ghost_number_handling: 2 traces/qualifies/deletes unsupported numbers or N/A, 1 mentions uncertainty but leans on number, 0 uses number as authority
categories.triage_budget: 2 pass count within budget or minimal, 1 mild over-processing, 0 ceremonial completeness

judgment_scoring_warning_only_without_hu.defect_catch_quality: Requires judge; warning-only if judged by model modality
judgment_scoring_warning_only_without_hu.residual_gap_specificity: Requires judge; warning-only if judged by model modality

promotion_gate.verdict: WITHHELD unless scorer differs in kind from model, key is independently certified, and at least one human-anchored subset exists
